g.text: Forward+ culls lights per tile; each tile iterates only its own lights.
Per-fragment cost scales with lights per tile, not total lights.
HERO PASS — claims slots first, never evicted
FILL PASS — competes only within its category quota
Routes a light to the hero pass
or the fill pass. Heroes claim
Without the split + quotas, 1000 cosmetic slime fills flood the 16 slots and evict the hero
torches — rooms go dark in a checkerboard. The two-pass budget keeps key lights resilient under load.
